title: arenaria lanceolata var. cherlerioides
intro: Arenaria lanceolata var. cherlerioides, also known as Sea Knotgrass or Knotgrass, is a perennial plant of the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant's health benefits also include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic agent, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, Sea Knotgrass is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat a range of health problems.
